actions_taken: Deployed 25 officers; Set up 8 barricades at Hebbal Junction; Activated detour Route A; Re-timed signal at Windsor Manor (+30s green).
lessons_learned: Windsor Manor junction saturated quickly; early diversion signs at Ganganagar would have helped.

actions_taken: Deployed 18 officers; Created one-way restriction; Diverted heavy traffic via Outer Ring Road; Opened temporary pedestrian crossings.
lessons_learned: Pedestrian crowd control was the main challenge; separate pedestrian lanes are required next time.

actions_taken: Deployed 30 officers; Banned parking around stadium; Closed Cubbon Road for 2 hours post-match; Diverted traffic via MG Road and Kasturba Road.
lessons_learned: Metro capacity was saturated; park-and-ride options outside CBD would reduce private car volumes.

actions_taken: Deployed 12 officers; Set up barricades at Bellandur junction; Recommended carpooling via social media; Kept service lanes clear.
lessons_learned: Service lane parking was a major bottleneck; tow trucks need to be positioned in advance.

actions_taken: Cleared Corridor completely for 15 minutes; Positioned 10 officers at key junctions; Set signals to green corridor wave.
lessons_learned: Green corridor wave works well but creates large pile-ups on intersecting roads; require shorter clearance windows.

actions_taken: Deployed 35 officers; Created major diversion via HMT Road; Re-timed signals at Peenya Junction; Stationed recovery cranes.
lessons_learned: Breakdowns of rally buses on main carriageway caused severe blockages; strict vehicle fitness checks should be pre-enforced.

actions_taken: Deployed 10 officers; Created temporary parking zone at playground; Restricted right turns at Madiwala junction.
lessons_learned: Madiwala flyover helped bypass local traffic; flyover exits must be kept free of street vendors.

actions_taken: Deployed 8 officers; Utilized empty layout plots for parking; Activated local route diversions.
lessons_learned: Poor street lighting on detour roads caused slow movement; mobile lighting masts are recommended.

actions_taken: Deployed 15 officers; Re-timed signal at MG Road junction (+15s green); Suspended street parking on Residency Road.
lessons_learned: Residency Road side-streets got congested; require better signage for parking garages.

actions_taken: Deployed 14 officers; Diverted traffic via Bilekahalli cross; Banned heavy vehicles during peak hours.
lessons_learned: Heavy vehicle ban helped; however; two-wheeler traffic on sidewalks required police intervention.
